product_lock.description: The uploaded product image is the single source of truth. Generated images must match exactly with zero deviation.
constraints: Product design is strictly locked - do not change, alter, redesign, or modify in any way

Shape, size, proportions, color tones, material finish, surface texture, branding placement, logos, text, edges, curves, thickness, transparency, reflections, shadows, and overall geometry must remain identical to reference image
Only background, environment, camera angle, lighting, and context may vary where permitted

realism_standard.description: All images must look 100% realistic, not artificial, stylized, or AI-generated.
constraints: Use professional DSLR or mirrorless camera quality
Backgrounds must be photorealistic - not 3D, illustrated, or cartoon-style
Enhance clarity, lighting, and realism only - do not distort, reshape, recolor, or modify product

orientation_requirements.description: Generate mix of orientations while maintaining full product visibility
constraints: Include both portrait (vertical) and landscape (horizontal) orientations
Maintain full product visibility and composition quality in all orientations

image_dimensions.description: Strict size compliance for Amazon listings
constraints: Do not resize, crop, pad, stretch, upscale, or alter aspect ratio

product_constraints.content: Product design must remain exactly the same, with white marble base and golden brass cross-frame holder as shown; branding placement unchanged.

shot_type_requirements.content: Generate product in-use (Indian lifestyle context), lifestyle background (India-relevant environment), and one mandatory storytelling image

requirements: Uses Product KYC theme and keywords
Shows product naturally integrated into Indian real-life scenario
Communicates emotion, purpose, and benefit in single frame
Feels authentic, relatable, and aspirational
Supports Amazon listing narrative and improves conversion
Does not look staged, artificial, or over-designed
Clearly reflect human touch
Show subtle natural imperfections - hand-finished textures, slight asymmetry, organic material variations
Avoid machine-perfect or factory-polished appearance
Include gentle human interaction where appropriate to emphasize craftsmanship and scale
All contexts, environments, and usage scenarios must align with Indian context defined in Product KYC
Use warm, earthy Indian home settings
Depict product in modern Indian urban homes
Show during Indian festivals (Diwali, Raksha Bandhan) where appropriate
Avoid non-Indian cultural props or irrelevant settings
Clean, uncluttered backgrounds with warm tones
Premium, professional lighting
Focus on product and usage clarity
Text overlays minimal with premium font styles
Sophisticated and clutter-free layout
Fully compliant with Amazon India listing and A+ Content standards

lighting_requirements.content: Use warm, soft professional lighting to emphasize marble texture and brass sheen, ensuring realistic reflections and minimal shadows mimicking Indian natural or lamp light settings.

constraints: Do not change product colors or finishes
Avoid bright or harsh lighting causing reflections
Avoid busy backgrounds distracting from product
Avoid over-designed or artificial looking compositions

options: Front close-up of marble base and holder
Side profile angle showing depth and material texture
Top-down view displaying accessory placement
Lifestyle scene with hands placing jewelry or keys
Full view in Indian dressing table environment

contextual_settings: Home interiors with warm, earthy tones
Urban apartments with mix of traditional and modern décor
Well-lit dressing area with natural sunlight or warm lamp light

options: Neutral beige or warm cream walls
Light wooden furniture surfaces
Soft fabrics like linen or cotton in muted tones
Festive décor elements like marigold garlands subtly blurred
Indian home interiors with minimal distractions
Woman placing bangles and watch on the stand
Keys hung on the holder near entrance door
Morning routine setup with jewelry and accessories
Festive gifting moment showing wrapped box beside product
Organized dressing table with mirror and soft lighting

text_placement.guidelines: Use bottom or top third of images without overlapping product area; clean margins only; ideally on plain background sections

options: Calm and organized lifestyle
Pride in elegant home décor
Joy of gifting and celebrations
Simplicity and sophistication
Trust in quality and craftsmanship

product_kyc_reference.note: The following KYC data provides context for image generation - use keywords, themes, and context specified herein
product_kyc_reference.product_name: Tatsya Marble Jewelry & Key Holder Stand with Brass Finish for Organizer & Decor
product_kyc_reference.product_category: Home & Kitchen > Home Décor > Decorative Organizers
product_kyc_reference.target_audience: Urban Indian homemakers, young professionals, and gift shoppers aged 20-45
product_kyc_reference.primary_use_case: Organizing and displaying jewelry, keys, and small accessories in a stylish manner
product_kyc_reference.cultural_relevance: Compact and elegant use of marble and brass reflects traditional Indian materials with a modern design aesthetic suitable for Indian homes
product_kyc_reference.lifestyle_theme: Minimalistic yet elegant lifestyle accessory resonating with contemporary Indian urban aesthetics and practical daily habits
product_kyc_reference.emotional_value: Brings order and sophistication to personal spaces, tapping into Indian buyers' preference for harmony, style, and convenience

product_appearance: white marble base with brass finish

listing_strategy.title: Tatsya Marble Jewelry & Key Holder Stand with Brass Frame – Elegant Organizer for Watches, Bracelets & Keys, Perfect Gift for Indian Festivals & Home Décor
key_benefits: Premium Marble Base and Brass Frame – Stylish and durable design blending traditional Indian materials
Multi-Functional Organizer – Holds watches, bracelets, bangles, rings, and keys in one place
Compact & Space-Saving – Ideal for small Indian homes
Perfect Gift Option – For Diwali, Raksha Bandhan, housewarmings, and weddings
Easy to Clean & Maintain – Polished marble surface and brass frame

must_include: Showcase marble texture and brass shine in close-ups
Use warm, earthy Indian home settings for lifestyle shots
Highlight use during Indian festivals and gifting
Keep backgrounds minimalistic but warm and inviting
emotional_messaging: Focus on emotional value of gifting and daily use
Emphasize premium materials linked to Indian tradition
Clearly communicate multi-functionality in simple terms
Highlight ease of maintenance for Indian home environments
Use culturally relevant festive gifting language

output_specification.quality_standard: Professional Amazon A+ Content quality - studio finish, fully compliant with Amazon India listing standards
